extraction.one_line_summary: FROOME Chris attacked with 500m remaining on Cumbre del Sol finish climb, gapping rivals after SKY controlled final ascent.
tactical_patterns: SKY chased down all breakaway attacks on penultimate climb to preserve energy for team-led final ascent control.
SOLER Marc and LUDVIGSSON Tobias attempted late bridge from break on Peñón de Ifach, revealing breakaway collapse timing.
DE LA CRUZ David's counter-attack immediately neutralized by SKY, showing team's willingness to chase even domestique-level moves.
Final acceleration launched at exactly 500m mark, suggesting pre-race video analysis directly shaped attack positioning.

rider_signals.FROOME Chris: positive: First stage win in a year, executed premeditated 500m attack after team reviewed 2015 footage.
rider_signals.BARDET Romain: neutral: Initiated early attack on final climb but lacked acceleration to sustain against SKY's tempo.
rider_signals.CHAVES Esteban: positive: Only GC rider to limit time loss within 10-second bonus threshold, confirmed strong form.
rider_signals.WOODS Michael: positive: Finished with bonus seconds group, showing puncher capacity on short explosive finish.
rider_signals.DE LA CRUZ David: negative: Solo attack immediately marked by entire SKY team, indicating opponents view him as threat.
